'''Fakir''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] in the [[Bakchou arm]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was at the brink of an ice age which consequently caused for strange illuminescent [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] to form in the upper [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Bioanalysis|The Glimmering Freeze}}</ref>

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], owned by the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out, it joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Following the conflict, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] occupied Fakir. Some of the Empire's wealth was stored there.

{{Planet-stub}}
